name: TC-09: Dashboard Bento Grid Metric Cards
description: Dashboard loads correct overview metrics for products, periods, and restock alerts.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page at /login
Type admin@suryaelektrik.com in the email input field
Type password123 in the password input field
Click the Masuk ke Sistem button
Verify the bento grid cards for TOTAL PRODUK, TOTAL PERIODE, and RESTOCK ALERT are visible
Verify each card displays a numeric counter value indicating status
